summary: Justin Brennan walks through the operational process for submitting deals for underwriting review through the AIOS portal. He specifies the four required documents (OM, rent roll, T12 P&L, and completed deal analyzer) and the submission email address to facilitate quick feedback on deal analysis.
takeaways: Submit four pieces: OM (property marketing flyer), rent roll, T12 (12-month P&L statement), and completed underwriting in deal analyzer
Email deals to support@multifamilyschool.com with property address and 'deal for review' in subject line
Submit underwriting in Excel format, ideally all documents via email
Same submission process applies to LOI (letter of intent) offers on properties
Use the portal's deal analyzer or your own preferred underwriting tool, submit in Excel

skill_candidates.change: Establish a standardized four-document submission checklist for every deal review request
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin specifies exact documents required (OM, rent roll, T12, underwriting) and email address (support@multifamilyschool.com) to streamline the review process and get 'pretty quick' feedback

title: SUBMIT DEAL FOR REVIEW
